subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! God willing, mayest thou be blessed and joyous through divine favor. Ever hath the mention of the handmaidens of that land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی انشاء الله بعنایت الهی فائز و مسرور باشی لازال ذکر اماء آن ارض از
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @personal instructions, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
